selections.name: Native Clan
selections.reason: Won a BM60 two starts back and drops in class slightly here. Gets a favorable weight setup.

selections.name: Elegantly Written
selections.reason: Consistent form with a win and a third recently. Top weight is a slight concern on soft ground but has class.

selections.name: Montezulu
selections.reason: Capable of better than the latest run and was a close second two starts back in this grade.

selections.name: Skelmorlie
selections.reason: Second run back from a spell. Should improve with fitness and gets the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Steele My Sunshine
danger_horse.reason: Receives a significant weight advantage at 119lbs which could make her dangerous late.

selections.name: Too Much Too Soon
selections.reason: Shipping in with strong form lines. Second last start and looks well placed to break through here.

selections.name: Lawrenny Boys
selections.reason: Racing well with a solid second last time out. Drawn well to be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Primrose Boy
selections.reason: Good second last start and gets a great inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Northern Child
selections.reason: Resuming but has shown ability in the past. Can figure if ready to go.

danger_horse.name: Can't Catch Chilli
danger_horse.reason: Solid third last start shows she is nearing a win, though the wide draw is a slight negative.

selections.name: Gold Tianna
selections.reason: Strong second last start and gets the inside barrier to dictate terms or sit just off the pace.

selections.name: Light Force
selections.reason: Consistent performer who was a good second last time out. Ready to peak.

selections.name: Symphony Queen
selections.reason: Recent form is sound with a nice third last start. Drawn well to get a soft run.

selections.name: Lord Hear Us
selections.reason: Capable of a better run than the latest effort. Has shown glimpses of ability.

danger_horse.name: Raider's Own
danger_horse.reason: Forgive the last start; previous form was solid enough to suggest he can bounce back.

selections.name: Veins Within Rock
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start and looks to have plenty of upside over this distance.

selections.name: Florence Glass
selections.reason: Also coming off a win and gets a nice weight relief. Major threat.

selections.name: Iffycould
selections.reason: Classy type who can finish strongly. The weight allowance helps his chances.

selections.name: Goddess Of Rock
selections.reason: Solid second last start and continues to race well. Must be respected.

danger_horse.name: Happy Clan
danger_horse.reason: Top weight but has the class to overcome it if the pace sets up for him.

selections.name: Crystal Moonbeam
selections.reason: Won nicely last start and looks capable of taking the next step in this grade.

selections.name: Toganmain
selections.reason: Another last-start winner who maps well from a good draw.

selections.name: Live On Love
selections.reason: Good third last start and gets a favorable inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: Tribal Council
selections.reason: Carrying top weight but has the class to be competitive if things go his way.

danger_horse.name: Carnelian Rock
danger_horse.reason: Recent form is sound and can swoop late if the pace is hot.

selections.name: I'm A Machine
selections.reason: Dominant winner last start and looks to have plenty of progression left.

selections.name: Merlin Beach
selections.reason: Also a last-start winner with strong form lines. Main danger.

selections.name: Star Performer
selections.reason: Consistent type who was a solid third last time out. Wide draw is the only concern.

selections.name: Ice Crystal
selections.reason: Gets a nice weight allowance and ran a good third last start.

danger_horse.name: South Georgia
danger_horse.reason: Drawn perfectly inside and can improve on recent efforts.

selections.name: Sandual
selections.reason: Impressive winner last start and looks very hard to beat again despite the draw.

selections.name: Hurricane Ketut
selections.reason: Good third last start and gets a perfect inside draw to map well.

selections.name: Golden Meadow
selections.reason: Solid second last time out and continues to race in great form.

selections.name: Agnete
selections.reason: Won well last start and has the tactical speed to overcome the middle draw.

danger_horse.name: Flying Billie
danger_horse.reason: Classy top weight who can figure if they overdo it up front.

selections.name: Flying Concello
selections.reason: Strong winner last start and maps perfectly from the inside draw to repeat.

selections.name: Material Madam
selections.reason: Chased hard for second last start and is a major threat with a clean break.

selections.name: Esprit Diva
selections.reason: Good third last start and gets a massive weight advantage from the inside gate.

selections.name: Araya Sunshine
selections.reason: Capable of better than the last start and has back class to feature.

danger_horse.name: Gingerson
danger_horse.reason: Drawn well and can improve sharply on recent form.
